title: Agents Are Just Loops
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates building AI agents using the Strands Agents SDK, starting from a simple calculator agent and progressing to multi-agent orchestrators. The video emphasizes that agents are fundamentally loops where a model reasons about which tool to use, executes it, and repeats until reaching an answer.
